mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CTI_ESCALATION_TBL (SVCNO, LINKEDID, REG_DATE, SENDER_ID, DEPTCD, SUMMARY, ESC_MEMO, STATUS, ADDTIME, UPDTIME, UPDEMP) VALUES (#{SVCNO, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ISNULL(#{LINKEDID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'MANUAL'), ISNULL(#{REG_DATE, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, GETDATE()), #{SENDER_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{DEPTCD, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{SUMMARY, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{ESC_MEMO, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ISNULL(#{STATUS, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '100'), GETDATE(), GETDATE(), #{SENDER_ID, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: UPDATE CTI_ESCALATION_TBL SET DEPTCD = #{DEPTCD, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SUMMARY = #{SUMMARY, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, ESC_MEMO = #{ESC_MEMO, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, STATUS = #{STATUS, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FEEDBACK_MEMO = #{FEEDBACK_MEMO, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, FEEDBACK_DATE = #{FEEDBACK_DATE, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, FEEDBACK_USER = #{FEEDBACK_USER, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDTIME = GETDATE(), UPDEMP = #{FEEDBACK_USER, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE ESCALATION_NO = #{ESCALATION_NO}
